name: Julie Hickman
body: Continue to pray and she is on our Bible study prayer list in Florida. (They remember Lyla from last year). Trusting God is always with you through the heartache, the healing and the rebuilding. ❤️‍🩹🥰🙏

name: Chuck N Lori W
body: Continuing to pray for you all. 🙏 Thanks for the update and the pictures! 🙏💕🙏

name: Mindy Leach
body: Thank you so much for the update! Love the picture of Lyla and Micah! So sweet! ❤️ Continued prayers for all of you! 🙏

name: K Rush
body: Looks like Lyla's ready to do a jump-stop and dunk it in that one photo. Praying.

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: Prayers continue. Thank you for the update. Happy to hear the 2nd infusion went better. I keep asking God for a miracle for Lyla.

name: Charlie Pagnard
body: We are praying for Lyla every day. May the Lord bless her and provide peace for all of you through this journey.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: We are continuing to pray with you for healing, while thanking God for your faithful testimony as you wait. Love you all.

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: (And asking God for the desire of my heart for Lyla!)

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: Your story continues to be an inspiration and a blessing in my own life. Still keeping my noon appointment, and praying for your sweet girl, all of you, and for the path you take & for all on that path with you!

name: Graham Geisler
body: Amen, brother. May Jesus bless you all with faith, perseverance and healing as God wills. Lord, please touch this little girl.
